digest.en: US Secretary of State Antony Blinken is on his way to the Middle East. He heads to Israel and Jordan to discuss a possible ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. The US and Israel are also weighing a new Iranian offer to open the Strait of Hormuz.
digest.hi: ईरान ने अमेरिका के सामने शर्तें रखकर होर्मुज जलसंधी को खोलने की बात कही है। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने सुरक्षा टीम के साथ बैठक की। इस बीच, दक्षिणी लेबनान में इस्राइल के हमलों से तबाही हुई है, जिसका खुलासा सैटेलाइट तस्वीरों में हुआ है।

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Offers To Open Strait Of Hormuz, Gives US Conditions
articles.summary: Iran offered to open the Strait of Hormuz and gave the US conditions for a ceasefire. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Offers To Open Strait Of Hormuz, Gives US Conditions NDTV.

articles.title: Box to launch Box Automate service to expedite enterprise business processes, CEO says
articles.summary: Box CEO announced the launch of Box Automate to expedite enterprise business processes. Box to launch Box Automate service to expedite enterprise business processes, CEO says.

articles.title: Beyond the ‘iron rice bowl’: Why more young Chinese are choosing flexible work
articles.summary: One in three Chinese workers are in flexible jobs, with younger generations seeking autonomy. Around one in three workers in China are now in flexible jobs, led by a younger generation seeking greater autonomy despite the trade-offs.

articles.title: China is remaking the South China Sea with a return to island-building
articles.summary: China is building a new outpost at Antelope Reef in the South China Sea. A new Chinese outpost at Antelope Reef won’t create legal rights but will shape control over disputed waters, says a maritime law professor from Western Sydney University.

articles.title: Iran FM in Russia says US has offered new round of talks
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met in Russia to discuss a possible new round of talks with the US. Russia is hosting Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi in St. Petersburg for talks on a possible new round of talks.

articles.title: China seeks to block US tech giant Meta from AI acquisition
articles.summary: China is blocking US tech giant Meta from an AI acquisition amid tightened scrutiny. Bejing tightens scrutiny of AI industry amid intensifying geopolitical rivalry with the US over the technology.

articles.title: Iran Offers Plan to Focus on Strait of Hormuz and Delay Nuclear Talks
articles.summary: Iran proposed opening the Strait of Hormuz to shipping traffic and lifting the U. S. blockade in a new offer delivered on Sunday. The plan delays nuclear talks with the U. until later.

articles.title: Canada’s New Route to Citizenship Has Thousands of Americans Lining Up to Apply
articles.summary: Canada's new citizenship route has thousands of Americans applying through ancestral ties. Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.

articles.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrive for high-profile US state visit
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrived in the US for a state visit. The trip aims to strengthen ties amid tensions over the Iran conflict. The British monarch’s US visit underscores shared history amid strained ties and tensions over the Iran conflict.

articles.title: Hezbollah and Israel swap threats and strikes across Lebanon’s border
articles.summary: Hezbollah and Israel exchanged threats and strikes across Lebanon's border, escalating tensions. Iran-linked group reiterates defiance; Israeli defence minister threatens to ‘burn all of Lebanon'. Hezbollah and Israel swap threats and strikes across Lebanon’s border.

articles.title: Pompeii archaeologists use AI to reconstruct face of man who died during volcano eruption
articles.summary: Archaeologists used AI to reconstruct a man's face who died in Pompeii's 79AD eruption. The digital reconstruction is a first for the field. Archaeologists and researchers have used artificial intelligence for the first time to digitally reconstruct the face of a man killed in the eruption of Mount Vesuvius that engulfed the ancient Roman city of Pompeii in 79AD.

articles.title: More than 100 migrants rescued in Channel less than week after £650m France deal
articles.summary: Over 100 migrants were rescued from the English Channel. The rescue occurred less than a week after the UK and France signed a £650m deal. More than 100 migrants have been rescued from the English Channel, less than a week after the UK signed a new deal with the French government to curb crossings.

articles.title: Thousands held by paramilitary RSF in Sudan’s el-Fasher: NGO
articles.summary: The RSF paramilitary group is holding thousands of people in Sudan's el-Fasher. Hundreds of women and children are among the detained. Hundreds of women and children among those detained by the rebel group, says Sudan Doctors Network.

articles.title: King Charles III arrives in U.S. on delicate mission to restore U.K.-U.S. relationship
articles.summary: King Charles III arrived in the US to restore the UK-US relationship. The President referred to him as a friend and great guy. The President has spoken in glowing terms about King Charles, repeatedly referring to the monarch as his “friend” and a “great guy”.

articles.title: Trump Discusses Iran Offer To Open Straits Of Hormuz
articles.summary: Trump discussed Iran's proposal to open the Hormuz Strait with his national security team. US President Donald Trump on Monday met his national security team to discuss Iran's latest proposal to open the Hormuz Strait, the crucial waterway for transporting one-fifth of the global oil supplies.

articles.title: Man charged with attempted assassination of Trump in White House correspondents' dinner shooting
articles.summary: A 31-year-old man was charged with attempted assassination of Trump at a White House correspondents' dinner.

articles.title: Dave Nicholas joins The Times as Senior Vice President, Global Security
articles.summary: Dave Nicholas joined The New York Times Company as Senior Vice President of Global Security. He will oversee security operations. Dave Nicholas joins The Times as Senior Vice President, Global Security The New York Times Company.

articles.title: At least four killed and dozens injured in Indonesia train crash
articles.summary: A commuter train and a long-distance train collided near Jakarta, killing four people and injuring dozens on Monday. Officials say a commuter train and a long-distance train collided on the outskirts of Jakarta on Monday.

articles.title: United Nations Human Rights Committee Issues Favorable Decision in Support of Teymur Akhmedov
articles.summary: The United Nations Human Rights Committee issued a decision in support of Teymur Akhmedov. United Nations Human Rights Committee Issues Favorable Decision in Support of Teymur Akhmedov JW. ORG.

articles.title: Freedom of navigation not negotiable: IMO addresses UN Security Council on maritime safety in
articles.summary: The International Maritime Organization Secretary-General said freedom of navigation is not negotiable, warning that any deviation from established principles would undermine shipping operations worldwide, setting a negative precedent and destabilizing global shipping.

articles.title: 465-Foot Russian Superyacht Worth Over $500 Million Crosses Hormuz Strait
articles.summary: A Russian superyacht linked to Alexey Mordashov sailed through the Strait of Hormuz, valued over $500 million. A superyacht linked to sanctioned Russian billionaire Alexey Mordashov sailed through Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: ईरान होर्मुज खोलने को तैयार, अमेरिका के सामने रखी ये शर्तें; ट्रंप ने सुरक्षा टीम के साथ की बैठक

articles.title: रूस में इंटरनेट पर सरकार की मज़बूत होती पकड़ से बढ़ती नाराज़गी
articles.summary: रूस में इंटरनेट का इस्तेमाल सीमित हो गया है, जिससे लोगों में नाराज़गी बढ़ रही है। इसकी तुलना सोवियत दौर की सेंसरशिप और आज के डिजिटल ब्लैकआउट से की जा रही है, जिससे लोगों की स्वतंत्रता पर अंकुश लग रहा है।

articles.title: परमाणु मुद्दे पर वार्ता को लेकर ईरान की US को दो टूक, देखें दुनिया आजतक
articles.summary: ईरान ने परमाणु मुद्दे पर वार्ता को लेकर अमेरिका को स्पष्ट संदेश दिया है। ईरान ने अपनी शर्तें रखी हैं। वार्ता के लिए अमेरिका को ईरान की मांगों पर विचार करना होगा।

hi.title: परमाणु मुद्दे पर वार्ता को लेकर ईरान की US को दो टूक, देखें दुनिया आजतक

articles.title: क्या ट्रंप ने वाकई 8 ईरानी महिलाओं को फांसी से बचा लिया है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने दावा किया था कि उनकी अपील के बाद ईरान ने 8 महिलाओं की फांसी की सज़ा रद्द कर दी है। लेकिन ईरान ने कहा कि उन महिलाओं को फांसी देने का उसका कोई इरादा नहीं था।

hi.title: क्या ट्रंप ने वाकई 8 ईरानी महिलाओं को फांसी से बचा लिया है?

articles.title: हिल्टन होटल में ट्रंप पर हमले से जुड़ी क्या है ताजा अपडेट? जानें
articles.summary: पूर्व अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप पर हिल्टन होटल में हमला हुआ था। हमले के बाद, ट्रंप को अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया था। ट्रंप की सेहत में सुधार होने के बाद, उन्हें अस्पताल से छुट्टी मिल गई है।

articles.title: ट्रंप-ईरान के सोशल मीडिया डिप्लोमेटिक वॉर ने कैसे फेल करा दिया आसिम मुनीर और शहबाज शरीफ का गेम?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप और ईरान के बीच सोशल मीडिया पर डिप्लोमेटिक वॉर चला था। इस वॉर में पाकिस्तान के प्रधानमंत्री आसिम मुनीर और विदेश मंत्री शहबाज शरीफ की भूमिका पर सवाल उठाए गए थे।
